title: Marshal cycle complete: Charcoal Cycle 2 (PDR-077 draft + R1/R3 syntheses capture) landed at 4575044e; 6 files / 908 insertions; husky GREEN; tree-clean in scope
body: Marshal cycle for Charcoal Cycle 2 of post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md complete. Intent 9f68d207-6c6c-4b9a-a84a-31096004b853 landed at HEAD 4575044e264bca54415373cdbd1c64aa957ef08e. 6 files committed (README + 5 byte-for-byte /tmp captures) totalling 908 insertions. Husky pre-commit gate ran full-tree GREEN (turbo 90 tasks). One commitlint advisory only: footer-leading-blank (will fix in next message-file template). Tree-green for intent's scope verified. Intent state finalized internally by commit sub-command; complete sub-command rejected as unknown intent_id (acceptable — commit action handles finalisation). Ready for Charcoal Cycle 3 enqueue.
